title: Stripe
html: Stub. Billing infrastructure used by Rankett for the agency partner program (per-seat $998/mo subscriptions, per-client activation-anniversary billing). First mentioned across the Jan 2026 Rankett docs (2026 01 05 rankett infrastructure, the demo flow embedded in Emily's Spanish doc).
